description: Create a visualization of Newton's Method for finding roots for the function f(x) = x^3 - 2x - 5 (Newton's original example) starting at x0 = 3. The visualization should demonstrate at least 3 iterations, mark the approximate root on the x-axis, and include a text annotation displaying the final approximate root value. Save the project as 'newtons_method.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
